ddt:Target.Name: 4RD X91 V4.2
ddt:Target.Description:
C. CHASSAGNOL - 65630 - UET C tel : +331 768 57726 Base DDT V4.2 (26/04/06) --> A UTILISER A PARTIR DE LA VAGUE SLOT V1K (juin 2006)
1) requests : - Adding of IOControl RWAPositionRequest Status : allows to know the status of the on-going request - adding of IOControl RWAPositionRequest Stop : allows to stop the on-going request - correction of IOControlRWAPositionRequest Start : changed from permanent to temporary control - adding of Reprog session request ($1085) - adding of templates for 3B and 21 requests (due to configuration file tool evolution) - adding of a data for data recorder request for testing needs - name changed for request 3B1A : "static & dynamic inhibition" changed to "System Inhibition" - text for value 04h of RoutineEntryStatus modified - Adding of value 14h for ouputcontrolStatus of IOControl - StartRoutine - ECU init phase : routine entry option 01 is not supported anymore 2) Screens : - modification of Read/ Write - Enable / disable functions : Musplit functions and developpment frames cannot be activated / inhibited through this screen anymore. Adding of a reset button in screen Read/ Write - Enable / disable Functions - adding of one screen for IOControl - modification of screen StartRoutine - oscillation of actuator 3) DataID - DataRead.MiniConsumptionRequest : value 0 and 3 of parameter MiniConsumptionRequest have been defined - correction of ESP, USM, 4WS and BCM absence flags (to conform to the specification) 4) HW Number basic part changed from 28505 to 28506

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
MainMPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Servo MPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Absolute Sensor Data (wires or sensor or acquisition)
motor or driver or current sensor
ECU internal relay stuck close or 3-phase connector disconnected

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: counting and storage of mute/ absent failure masked
counting and storage of mute/ absent failure not masked
Only faults reports and alerts that must remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
all faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
all faults reports and alerts are enabled
no vehicle speed gradient failure detected
no vehicle speed sign failure detected

Data.Name: Speed of actuator for oscillation routine

Item.Text: control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
control aborted due to internal failure
control aborted due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)

Data.Name: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)

Item.Text: Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to failure
routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)
Routine completed and Nok : RAZ stopped due to internal fault
Routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)
Control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h (12h)
Control aborted due to tool unplugged (session C0 stopped) (14h)

Data.Name: Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)
Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Long List)

Item.Text: RWA Request from ESP will not be applied
RWA Request from ESP will be applied

Request.Name: WDBLId - Functional Data Processing Parameters Set
RDBLId - Functional Data Processing Parameters Set
WDBLId - Forward Static FFD Parameters Set n1
WDBLId - Forward Static FFD Parameters Set n2
RDBLId - Forward Static FFD Parameters Set n2
WDBLId - Reverse Static FFD Parameters Set n1
RDBLId - Reverse Static FFD Parameters Set n1
WDBLId - Reverse Static FFD Parameters Set n2
RDBLId - Reverse Static FFD Parameters Set n2
WDBLId - Forward Dynamic FFD Parameters Set
RDBLId - Forward Dynamic FFD Parameters Set
WDBLId - Enable/ disable mu split function
RDBLId - Enable/ disable mu split function
ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: RDBLId - Static & Dynamic Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

DataItem.Name: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)
Speed of actuator for oscillation routine

Request.Name: RDBLId - Forward Static FFD Parameters Set n1
TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

DataItem.Name: Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)
Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Long List)

Device.Name: motor or driver or current sensor
MainMPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Servo MPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Absolute Sensor Data (wires or sensor or acquisition)
ECU internal relay stuck close or 3-phase connector disconnected

Label.Text: Lecture de la trame diag mux frame
sélectionner la vitesse de l'actionneur (slow ou fast)
appuyer sur la fleche "play" pour raffraichir les infos et rendre le pilotage possible
Avant de lancer la routine (bouton start), il faut placer le véhicule sur un pont roues arrières pendantes
lecture du nom de calibration en mémoire
ecriture nom de la calibration en mémoire

Input.DataName: Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)

Screen.Name: Read/ Write - Enable / Disable Functions - Scenario error

Label.Text: Valeurs des paramètres à ecrire en mémoire
READ/ WRITE de l'activation des différentes fonctions
Attention ! les modifications des paramètres peut entrainer un comportement dangeureux du vehicule

Send.RequestName: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Button.Text: prise en compte paramètres EEPROM (reset ECU) - uniquement si vitesse nulle

Input.RequestName: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Display.RequestName: RDBLId - Static & Dynamic Inhibition Flags Parameters Set
RDBLId - Enable/ disable mu split function

Label.Text: Avant de lancer la routine (bouton start), il faut placer le véhicule sur un pont roues arrières pendantes

Input.DataName: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)
Speed of actuator for oscillation routine
